docs.title: CertDirectory Credentials
docs.text: Welcome to the official documentation for the CertDirectory Credentials platform — a modern, Open Badges 3.0–compliant system for issuing, verifying, and managing digital credentials.

docs.title: What you can do
docs.text:
• Issue verifiable digital credentials to recipients individually or in bulk.
  • Verify any credential publicly via a unique link or QR code.
  • Renew expired or time-bound credentials, with full credential linking.
  • Manage your organization, members, badges, and credentials from a single dashboard.

docs.title: Where to start
docs.text:
• New to the platform? Start with the Introduction and Quickstart.
  • Issuing your first credential? Jump to For Organizations.
  • Just received a credential? See For Recipients.
  • Building an integration? Visit the API Reference.

docs.title: Need help?
docs.text:
• Check the FAQ and Troubleshooting guides.
  • Reach out via GitHub.

docs.title: Contributors
docs.text:
A heartfelt thank-you to everyone who has contributed to building, documenting, testing, and improving the CertDirectory Credentials platform.

This page lists individuals who have contributed to the project. To add your name, see the contribution guide on GitHub.

docs.title: Contributors
docs.text: Want to contribute? Check out the GitHub repository and open an issue or pull request.

docs.title: Renewing Credentials
docs.text:
This page is a stub. Content coming soon.

Renew expired, active time-bound, or revoked credentials. New credentials are linked to the original via "Superseded by" / "Renewed credential" relationships.

docs.title: Revoking Credentials
docs.text:
This page is a stub. Content coming soon.

Revoke a credential, with an optional reason. Revoked credentials remain verifiable but are clearly marked as revoked on the public profile and verification page.
